testCaseName: Controllers não devem importar repositórios diretamente
name: Controllers não devem importar repositórios diretamente

statusDetails.message:
Architecture Violation [Priority: MEDIUM] - Rule 'no classes that reside in a package 'com.portfolio.assetmanagement.interfaces..' should depend on classes that reside in a package 'com.portfolio.assetmanagement.infrastructure..', because Controllers devem falar apenas com Services. Acesso direto a repositórios em controllers quebra o isolamento de camadas e dificulta testes unitários.' was violated (7 times):
Constructor <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.interfaces.rest.costcenter.controller.CostCenterController.<init>(com.portfolio.assetmanagement.infrastructure.persistence.costcenter.repository.CostCenterRepository, com.portfolio.assetmanagement.security.context.LoggedUserContext)> has parameter of type <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.infrastructure.persistence.costcenter.repository.CostCenterRepository> in (CostCenterController.java:0)

Method <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.interfaces.rest.costcenter.controller.CostCenterController.deactivate(java.lang.Long)> calls method <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.infrastructure.persistence.costcenter.repository.CostCenterRepository.save(java.lang.Object)> in (CostCenterController.java:68)
